summary: Iteration 4 - Coach + enriched Dashboard tested end-to-end. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests pass (coach profile null, chat-without-profile 404, onboarding builds 6-9 trick roadmap with markdown-free welcome+why, trick complete sets status=done+completed_at, chat returns plain prose reply + messages array, dashboard/stats returns all required keys with markdown-free encouragement, unauth 401). Frontend: All flows verified - /dashboard with premium+profile shows 4 StatCards (7/1of8/1/7), 8-bar weekly chart with last=AUJ, MOT DU COACH panel with clean prose encouragement, 3 recent-analyses cards, 4 action cards (COACH/ANALYSE/COURS/SPOT FINDER). /coach with profile shows welcome text + ROADMAP/CHAT tabs, 8 tricks rendered, first trick done (opacity-60), VALIDÉ button validates the next one (7->6 buttons), chat tab sends message and receives plain-prose Claude reply in dark bubble. /coach without profile shows 3-step onboarding (level chips, trick chips with add-trick + Enter, goal textarea, GÉNÉRER MA ROADMAP) and successfully generated 8-trick roadmap. /dashboard without profile shows the 'Configure ton coach' CTA banner. Navbar shows COACH link between ABONNEMENTS and COURS on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1085 lines (was ~810). With coach + dashboard endpoints added, splitting into routers (auth, payments, video_analysis, spots, coach, dashboard) is strongly recommended for maintainability.

/api/coach/trick/complete accepts any 'trick' string silently - if the trick name doesn't match any roadmap item, the loop just no-ops and returns 200 with unchanged profile. Consider returning 404/400 when trick is not found in roadmap so the frontend can surface the issue.
/api/coach/trick/complete uses a raw await request.json() while siblings use a Pydantic model. Add a CoachTrickComplete model for consistency and validation.

/api/dashboard/stats day-counter days_active = max(1, (now-start).days). Same-day onboarding returns 1, which is fine, but using ceil semantics or storing 'sessions' would be more meaningful than a raw delta-days.
Roadmap difficulty is stored as a string ('1' to '5'), inconsistent with typical numeric scales; Frontend displays 'DIFF {t.difficulty}/5' so works either way, but typed as int would be cleaner.
CoachChatRequest has no max length on message - long pastes will inflate Claude token costs. Add max_length on the Pydantic field.
CORS still uses '*' with allow_credentials=True (carry-over from iter3) - browsers reject this combo for credentialed requests.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 pytest on new coach+dashboard endpoints; iter3 regression 23/23 still green)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (dashboard with+without profile, coach onboarding 3 steps, roadmap + VALIDÉ flow, chat send/receive, navbar COACH link)

seed_data_creation: Cleared and re-created db.coach_profiles for test-user-1781006912634 during tests. Final state at finish: a fresh roadmap generated by onboarding flow (no tricks done yet).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New test file /app/backend/tests/test_coach_dashboard.py. Helpers: _delete_profile() wipes coach profile via mongosh between tests. To reproduce onboarding-needed UI: mongosh -> db.coach_profiles.deleteOne({user_id:'test-user-1781006912634'}). Claude roadmap generation takes ~10-15s; chat ~4-6s; dashboard/stats encouragement ~3-5s - use 60s timeouts. Frontend testids added: tab-roadmap, tab-chat, roadmap-panel, chat-panel, chat-input, chat-send, trick-{i}, mark-done-{i}, onboarding-step-{0,1,2}, level-{name}, trick-input, add-trick, goal-input, ob-finish, cta-coach-onboarding, nav-coach, mobile-nav-coach, progress-chart.
rca of the issue: N/A - all features for iteration 4 (coach onboarding/roadmap/trick-complete/chat + dashboard stats with markdown-free encouragement) work as specified.
